subject: [PATCH v7 02/20] nfsd: add protocol support for CB_NOTIFY

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch adds protocol support for CB_NOTIFY in the nfsd module, which is part of the Linux kernel's Network File System (NFS) implementation. It introduces changes to various header files and regenerates XDR (External Data Representation) files to accommodate the new feature. The patch also removes duplicate definitions from nfs4.h and uapi nfs4 header, and updates constants such as NFS4_VERIFIER_SIZE and NFS4_FHSIZE according to RFC requirements. Additionally, it modifies the nfsstat4 enum to ensure that internal error codes do not leak onto the wire.
